caption: A man wearing a green baseball cap, black headphones, and a green t-shirt that reads "ION NEVER DO SHIT AT WORK" is speaking into a professional black microphone. He is positioned in a room with a wall of framed photographs and a white mannequin wearing a white t-shirt in the background. A clothing rack with several garments is also visible. On-screen, a logo featuring the word "TALE" inside a circle and the red text "TALE OF THE TAPE" appear in the lower corners. Throughout the sequence, the man's facial expression shifts as he speaks, moving from a slight smile with closed lips to an open-mouthed expression while talking. His head tilts and moves slightly, but he remains in the same position relative to the microphone and the background elements.
